arts.ttl: 'He needs to go' – Evan Ferguson told to leave Brighton this January as West Ham and Danny Ings claim made
arts.sum: All the latest transfer news and gossip for Brighton and Hove Albion and across the Premier League

arts.ttl: Brighton player ‘not very comfortable’ under Hürzeler – Appears to see future away from Seagulls
arts.sum: On Tuesday, we covered claims from Paraguay which stated Brighton & Hove Albion and Julio Enciso are negotiating a new deal. It was also reported the renewal is needed for the Seagulls to sanction a loan move in the winter market. Later that day, journalist Dominik Schneider said the 20-year-old is refusing to sign a The post Brighton player ‘not very comfortable’ under Hürzeler – Appears to see future away from Seagulls appeared first on Sport Witness.

Fabrizio Romano has revealed that West Ham and Brighton are locked to sign a promising young striker from Scottish Premiership side Celtic . New Hammers boss Graham Potter is set to go head-to-head in the transfer market against his former club in a battle to sign Daniel Cummings from the Scottish champions, with both West Ham and Brighton in the hunt for additional firepower this January.

arts.ttl: 'In which situations are they emotional' - Fabian Hurzeler summarises how to organise Brighton for two games in one week
arts.sum: With two games in one week, how do Brighton balance their squads for both fixtures? We spoke to Albion head coach Fabian Hurzeler about it.

arts.ttl: Fabian Hurzeler's Brighton XI at Ipswich Town predicted as Joao Pedro and Lewis Dunk decision made
arts.sum: Brighton boss Fabian Hurzeler has key fitness decisions to make as the Seagulls travel to Ipswich Town
